description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single build stage and two jobs named build:linux_client and build:linux_server. Use the ubuntu:trusty Docker image for both jobs, set global variables BUILD_THREADS=3 and MINETEST_DIR=$CI_PROJECT_DIR/minetest, and run a global before_script that executes $CI_PROJECT_DIR/scripts/before_script.sh then changes directory to "$MINETEST_DIR" before each job. In the build:linux_client job run $CI_PROJECT_DIR/scripts/build/linux_client.sh; in the build:linux_server job run $CI_PROJECT_DIR/scripts/build/linux_server.sh. After each job execute a global after_script that runs $CI_PROJECT_DIR/scripts/after_script.sh. No services, caches, artifacts, or conditional rules are defined.
